forge_reforge_archive.description: Historical forge and reforge build artifacts, snapshots, and intermediate outputs.

general_history_archive.description: General historical files, documentation, and notes.

paper_package_archive.description: FLCR paper packages, publication bundles, and flat document collections.

legacy_repo_zip.description: Legacy repository snapshots and code archives.

rule30_proof_archive.description: Rule 30 proof checkpoints and invariant proof archives.

ability_seed.reason: Archives are file bundles, not structured seed records. Existing ability_seed records already cover the legacy and local sources.

assembled_paper.reason: Paper archives contain flat documents, not structured paper metadata. FLCR papers already present in assembled_paper model.

verifier_receipt.reason: Some archives (rule30_proof_archive, legacy_repo_zip) may contain verify_*.json receipts that could map to verifier_receipt model. Requires per-archive deep inspection.

sm_mapping_row.reason: Archives do not contain structured mapping rows.

recommended_deep_inspection.rationale: Legacy repos may contain unharvested code, receipt, or registry data that maps to ability_seed or verifier_receipt.
Proof checkpoints may contain verify_*.json receipts and formal proof bindings that map to verifier_receipt or normal_form.
Product builds (GaussHaus, Fourpack) may contain runtime receipts and validator outputs.

conclusion: No new records ingested in this pass. The 296 archive_history crystals are documented and indexed. 286 are already extracted with file indexes. Model-mappable records require targeted deep inspection of legacy_repo_zip, rule30_proof_archive, and product_archive routes. This work is deferred to a future focused harvest session.
